openFindings.title: Continuity fixture validates a handover-first packet state that this packet does not ship
openFindings.description: The acceptance scenario and judged continuity fixture require handover.md to rank first for stop-state queries, but the packet currently ships no handover.md artifact, so the K=60 recommendation is validated against a synthetic packet shape rather than the packet's actual resume surfaces.

openFindings.title: description.json still points at the pre-renumber parent phase
openFindings.description: The packet metadata still stores 010-search-and-routing-tuning in parentChain even though the migration block and graph-metadata now point to 001-search-and-routing-tuning, leaving packet hierarchy metadata internally inconsistent after the 2026-04-21 renumber.

openFindings.title: Tier 3 prompt contract mixes canonical drop with the internal drop_candidate alias
openFindings.description: The public prompt declares eight canonical routing categories ending in drop, but the enumerated bullet list and merge-mode guidance still say drop_candidate and the frozen test codifies that alias, which increases vocabulary drift even though normalization keeps runtime behavior working.
